description: Fix VirtualizedLists should never be nested warning when switching to Checklist view

steps.name: Regression test for nested VirtualizedList
steps.description: Write a regression test that verifies StapleChecklist does not use FlatList (VirtualizedList) since it renders inside HomeView's ScrollView. The test should assert that the component renders items using plain View+map rather than FlatList.
acceptance_criteria: Test renders StapleChecklist inside a ScrollView (mirroring HomeView)
Test asserts no FlatList/VirtualizedList is present in the component tree
Test verifies staple items are still rendered correctly
steps.implementation_notes: Follow existing test patterns in tests/regression/checklist-toggle.test.tsx. Use renderApp() helper with ServiceProvider+AppShell. Switch to checklist mode and verify items render without FlatList.

steps.name: Replace FlatList with View+map in StapleChecklist
steps.description: Replace FlatList with a plain View that maps over sorted staples, eliminating the nested VirtualizedList warning. The staple list is small (~20-80 items) so virtualization is unnecessary.
acceptance_criteria: StapleChecklist renders using View+map instead of FlatList
No FlatList import remains in StapleChecklist.tsx
steps.implementation_notes: Replace FlatList with View, use .map() over sortedStaples array. Remove FlatList import. Keep StapleRow component unchanged.
